name: council-skills
description: The three-council audit protocol for analytical research: math-god-mode (active mathematicians), OG-math-experts (historical legends + control-theory founders), and controls-expert-reviewer (present-day engineering authorities). Enforces the council-log protocol that breaks iteration loops.

plugins.name: council
plugins.description: Three-council audit protocol: math-god-mode, OG-math-experts, controls-expert-reviewer. Each skill carries the Step-0 council-log discipline (read notes/council-log.md before any audit) to prevent compounding review loops.
